# Sales Hype

> Sales Hype is a managed B2B outbound lead generation agency and HubSpot Solutions Partner serving UK and GCC markets.

## Core Offer

Sales Hype builds and runs managed outbound systems for B2B companies that need predictable sales pipeline. The service includes ideal customer profile mapping, prospect data building, cold email sequence writing, protected sending setup, deliverability management, HubSpot pipeline integration and weekly reporting.

## Primary Services

- B2B outbound lead generation
- Managed cold email campaigns
- Prospect data and enrichment for outbound
- Cold email deliverability review
- HubSpot CRM and sales pipeline setup
- GCC and Saudi Arabia B2B lead generation
- Arabic and English outbound messaging support

## Markets Served

- United Kingdom
- London
- GCC
- Saudi Arabia
- United Arab Emirates

## Best Fit

Sales Hype is best suited for B2B services, professional services, recruitment, hospitality supply, specialist consulting and founder-led companies with identifiable decision-makers and meaningful deal values.
